title: Input Validation Cheat Sheet¶
attack_vector:
Input Validation Cheat Sheet
¶
Introduction
¶
This article is focused on providing clear, simple, actionable guidance for providing Input Validation security functionality in your applications.
Goals of Input Validation
¶
Input validation is performed to ensure only properly formed data is entering the workflow in an information system, preventing malformed data from persisting in the database and triggering malfunction of various downstream components. Input validation should happen as early as
impact: Attacker could exploit sql injection vulnerability
